references.hebrew: כׇּל־עָ֭רוּם יַעֲשֶׂ֣ה בְדָ֑עַת וּ֝כְסִ֗יל יִפְרֹ֥שׂ אִוֶּֽלֶת׃
references.english:
Those who are clever act knowledgeably,
But dullards expose their stupidity.

references.hebrew: רָשָׁ֗ע כְּגֹ֣בַהּ אַ֭פּוֹ בַּל־יִדְרֹ֑שׁ אֵ֥ין אֱ֝לֹהִ֗ים כׇּל־מְזִמּוֹתָֽיו׃
references.english:
The wicked, arrogant as they are,
in all their scheming [think],bThe wicked crow … their scheming [think] Meaning of Heb. uncertain.
“God does not carecGod does not care Lit. “There is no God.”
and does not call to account.”dClauses transposed for clarity.

references.hebrew: אִֽישׁ־אַ֭ף יְגָרֶ֣ה מָד֑וֹן וּבַ֖עַל חֵמָ֣ה רַב־פָּֽשַׁע׃
references.english:
An angry man provokes a quarrel;
A hothead commits many offenses.

references.hebrew: אַל־תְּבַהֵ֥ל בְּרֽוּחֲךָ֖ לִכְע֑וֹס כִּ֣י כַ֔עַס בְּחֵ֥יק כְּסִילִ֖ים יָנֽוּחַ׃
references.english: Don’t let your spirit be quickly vexed, for vexation abides in the breasts of fools.

references.hebrew: כִּ֛י בְּרֹ֥ב חׇכְמָ֖ה רׇב־כָּ֑עַס וְיוֹסִ֥יף דַּ֖עַת יוֹסִ֥יף מַכְאֽוֹב׃
references.english:
For as wisdom grows, vexation grows;
To increase learning is to increase heartache.
